title: Better Ladder 3D (Discontinued)
description: Revamps the vanilla ladder giving it a 3D appearance.
body:
Better Ladder (3D)

If you're bored of the flat ladder in Minecraft, then you will love this! This resource pack is solely for giving the vanilla Minecraft ladder a 3D model compared to its basic flat model.




 



If you are looking for a server to play with your friends, use code "OriginsStudios" for 25% off your first month or click the image down below
